info.title: Raydium Api V3
info.description:
All apis have outermost status information wrapped around them.
success { id: string, success: true, data: object }
failure { id: string, success: false, msg: string }

least.description: Minimum UI version number that users can use

get.description: offset = local utc time - chain time
advised to transfer position pool information
Estimated on-chain costs based on recent transactions
The list contains only the config info allowed when the UI creates the pool
The list contains only the config info allowed when the UI creates the pool
The list contains only the config info allowed when the UI creates the pool

icon.description: A list of icon URLs or identifiers

count.description: The count associated with the item

get.description: get pool info by lp mint
get pool info by token mint

parameters.name: poolType
parameters.description: Type of pool. Can be `Concentrated` or `Standard`. Optional — if not set, all types are returned.

parameters.name: mintFilter
parameters.description: Whether to filter by mint. Optional. please refer /main/mint-filter-config

parameters.name: hasReward
parameters.description: Whether to return only pools that have rewards. Optional.

parameters.name: sortType
parameters.description: Sorting order, either ascending (`asc`) or descending (`desc`). Optional.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of records to return per page.

parameters.name: nextPageId
parameters.description: The `id` returned from the previous page, used for pagination. Optional — if not provided, the first page is returned.

parameters.name: mint1
parameters.description: Filter for pools that include this mint. Optional.

parameters.name: mint2
parameters.description: Filter for pools that include this mint. Optional.

transferFeeConfigAuthority.description: The authority for transfer fee configuration.

withdrawWithheldAuthority.description: The authority for withdrawing withheld amount.

epoch.description: The epoch of the older transfer fee.

maximumFee.description: The maximum fee for the older transfer fee.

transferFeeBasisPoints.description: The transfer fee basis points for the older transfer fee.

epoch.description: The epoch of the newer transfer fee.

maximumFee.description: The maximum fee for the newer transfer fee.

transferFeeBasisPoints.description: The transfer fee basis points for the newer transfer fee.
